trigger.name: SCFT_INDACCTLINE_CKNAME_TRG
trigger.body:
/********************************************************************************** * Copyright (C) 2009 Openbravo S.L.U. * Licensed under the Openbravo Commercial License version 1.0 * You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.openbravo.com/legal/obcl.html ********************************************************************************** * Contributor(s): ______________________________________. **********************************************************************************/ BEGIN IF AD_isTriggerEnabled()='N' THEN RETURN; END IF; -- Verificar registros duplciados IF INSERTING THEN -- Validación al insertar: no debe existir otra línea con el mismo nombre en el mismo padre IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public.scft_indicatoracctline WHERE UPPER(name) = UPPER(:NEW.name) AND scft_indicatoracct_id = :NEW.scft_indicatoracct_id ) THEN RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20000, '@scft_duplicatetrg@'); END IF;
ELSIF UPDATING THEN -- Validación al actualizar: tampoco puede quedar duplicado dentro del mismo padre IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public.scft_indicatoracctline WHERE UPPER(name) = UPPER(:NEW.name) AND scft_indicatoracct_id = :NEW.scft_indicatoracct_id AND scft_indicatoracctline_id <> :NEW.scft_indicatoracctline_id ) THEN RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20000, '@scft_duplicatetrg@'); END IF; END IF; END SCFT_INDACCTLINE_CKNAME_TRG
